transcript: This is so awesome. It is 1.01 a.m. and we are here at the infamous train station of the first sighting of the Smiling Woman. Madeline,eline over here you gotta see this i'm sitting at the very bench where her first victim sat What's wrong? Oh, she's great. Dude, where did you hire her from? I didn't. What? I didn't hire her. She's gone. Where is she? There. Read this. Do you like my yellow dress? I know how this ends. I'm out. Zoe. Meet you at the car. Hey. Zoe, Wait up! Zoe! Zoe! Zoe? Zoe?
